body_preview: Hi Mom, Quick one. I'm pitching a personal project to Bon Appétit — a series on regional comfort food shot in Brooklyn apartments. Grandma's pierogies are the centerpiece shot I keep coming back to. Do you still have her actual recipe, or has it lived.
subject: Hi Mom

body_preview:
Jessie,

Of course I have the recipe — what do you think I've been making every Christmas? Found the index card in the tin with the roses on it. I'm typing it out right now so you don't have to squint at her handwriting.

The blue enamel pot is in the bas
subject: Re: Jessie

body_preview:
Mom,

The index card with the roses — I was hoping you'd say that. Can you scan it before you type it out? The handwriting is part of what I want to shoot.

You coming to make them would honestly be perfect, and not just for the shoot. Having you in the s
subject: Re: Mom

subject: Hi Jess

Dad,

Afternoon start helps — east-facing windows in Astoria get rough backlight by 3, so I'd want to know the room layout before committing. Do you know if they're doing the cake inside or outside? And what color is Lily's dress? Sounds like a weird ques
subject: Re: Dad

subject: Re: Jess

body_preview:
Hi Jesse,

Hard to believe Lily is almost one. We're doing a small backyard thing at Kevin's parents' place on July 12 — nothing crazy, maybe 20 people. But I've been obsessing over this cake smash setup and the whole dessert table is getting a little out
subject: Hi Jesse

body_preview: Priya, July 12 works. I'll block it. The pressed flower fondant from that Atlantic Ave place photographs really well if you've got north-facing light — which Kevin's parents' backyard actually has, depending on time of day. Aim for 11am or after 3pm.
subject: Re: Priya

body_preview:
Jesse!

Thank you, seriously. We'll aim for 3pm for the table, then Lily gets the cake. I'll make sure Kevin's mom doesn't rearrange the whole spread before you can shoot it — you know how she is about "making it look nice" in ways that involve moving eve
subject: Re: Jesse

body_preview:
Jess,

Got a restaurant job Tuesday — Luca's on Smith Street, seasonal menu launch. Shooting their pasta and small plates before service, so we're talking 7am call for that soft northern window light before the kitchen chaos starts. I need someone to carr
subject: Jess

body_preview:
Jesse!!

Yes, absolutely yes. I've been dying to see you work. I literally just watched three of your Instagram reels on the risotto shoot from last month — the one where the steam catches the backlight is SO good.

I'll be there at 7, all black, no perfu
subject: Re: Jesse

subject: Re: Jess
